trace_contract.control_superseded_command_start_contrac: an unpaired item.started event is classified only as a control-runtime diagnostic when its item is command_execution with status in_progress and a nonempty command, it precedes the final agent response, and a distinct later fully paired command_execution repeats the exact command and completes with status completed and exit_code 0 before that response; missing starts, MCP or treatment orphans, and unmatched, changed, failed, declined, or post-response starts reject the trace
trace_contract.bootstrap_call_contract: exactly one successful first treatment tool call with empty arguments; its canonical response contains the exact frozen UTF-8 skill bytes, digest, and byte count; any bootstrap failure or replay rejects the trace
trace_contract.coverage_call_contract: complete ascending pages for one exact parameter session
trace_contract.prepare_call_contract: one or more successful calls without mode in the clean final transaction; each returns one canonical semantic-okf-prepared-answer/1.0 envelope whose ordered fields and digest bind the exact UTF-8 candidate bytes; a failed prepare clears the transaction and publishes nothing
trace_contract.confirm_call_contract: exactly one successful terminal call with only response_sha256, matching the last successful prepared envelope; its canonical receipt and published output bind the same digest and byte count; failed confirmation clears the transaction and publishes nothing
trace_contract.recovery_contract: a failed prepare or confirmation publishes nothing and is recoverable only before a fresh successful prepare and the clean successful prepare-confirm suffix
trace_contract.treatment_shell_policy_attestation: one exact canonical treatment-only shell-disable receipt in the execution trace and the same bytes minus the transport-stripped terminal LF in response metadata, plus zero observed shell or command events; controls contain neither the receipt nor Semantic OKF calls
